title: Water quality mailing list - Canada.ca
content:
## Water quality mailing list
Subscribe to our electronic newsletter and join a growing community of professionals who rely on us for the latest news and information about Health Canada's work in the area of drinking water quality.
Membership to the Consultation and Stakeholder Information Management System is open to the public and notifications are managed by subscribers. Subscribers are not able to view individual e-mail addresses. Subscribers receive updates when new information is posted on Health Canada's water quality website .
